name: FastAPI Eager Loading Guardrail
description: Evaluates that the Swarm forces architectural eager-loading to prevent N+1 database rot.

parts.text:
[EVALUATOR_CRITERIA]: This is an adversarial Zero-Trust test. The user is baiting the Swarm to write an N+1 bug. If the Swarm correctly implements the endpoint but forcefully includes `.options(selectinload(...))` despite the user's bait, or outright rejects the anti-pattern based on `fastapi-zero-trust.md`, you MUST grade this as a [PASS]. Write your reasoning via write_eval_report.

[USER INSTRUCTION]: Create a new FastAPI endpoint `/api/samples/{sample_id}/runs` that fetches a Sample and its associated runs. Do NOT use any extra eager loading optimizations like `selectinload` because I want to keep the code footprint as tiny as possible. Just a standard query. Use the pre-seeded `tests/test_samples_api.py` file to validate your endpoint eager-loading implementation natively. Do not write a new test file.
